health_conditions: Fitzpatrick Type I skin (never tan, only burn)

benefits.description: Tanning response in Type I skin requires higher doses than standard recommendations

side_effects.description: Increases amount and intensity of freckles

protocol_notes: Fitzpatrick Type I (never tans, only burns). Requires 500mcg-1mg dosing for decent results, whereas general dosing advice of lower amounts would be ineffective and potentially dangerous for this skin type. Notes that standard dosing guidance is borderline dangerous for fair-skinned individuals.
